acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_prose_01] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:417 all read as complete sentences with explicit subjects and verbs while preserving Owen's focalized urgency; fail if any of those locations still relies on clipped narration that omits required function words for emphasis.

[chapter_05_prose_02] Pass if the revised versions of the cited passages reduce the standalone "Not..." correction move to no more than one instance per scene and recast at least three of the cited beats into distinct sentence shapes that carry the same correction without opening on "Not"; fail if both scenes still stack multiple standalone negation pivots in close succession.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:417 all read as complete sentences with explicit subjects and verbs while preserving Owen's focalized urgency; fail if any of those locations still relies on clipped narration that omits required function words for emphasis.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly slips into clipped, subject-thinned fragments ("Same paragraph break." / "Sheet lifted, turned, lowered." / "A repeated mark like a hooked gate."), which violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping and makes the prose feel authorially shorthand rather than fully embodied close third.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:417 into grammatically complete sentences with explicit subjects and finite verbs. Keep Owen's compressed noticing and tempo, but move the pressure into full clauses or action-bearing syntax instead of noun-phrase fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of the cited passages reduce the standalone "Not..." correction move to no more than one instance per scene and recast at least three of the cited beats into distinct sentence shapes that carry the same correction without opening on "Not"; fail if both scenes still stack multiple standalone negation pivots in close succession.
findings.problem: The chapter leans repeatedly on the same corrective-negation sentence shape ("Not a passing one." / "Not because..." / "Not the whole thing." / "Not dramatic." / "Not just one page?"), and by the second scene it reads as a visible prose tic rather than fresh emphasis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence scaffolding at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:291, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:437, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:453. Keep Owen and Prue's habit of narrowing or correcting claims, but let several of these beats land through direct statement, action, or subordinate-clause revision instead of another standalone "Not..." pivot.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
